serviceability.browser_web_app: Preferred enterprise deployment for centralized updates, access control, audit, observability, and provider-key governance.
serviceability.desktop_shell: Optional local/private packaging layer that starts the local service and opens the same console experience.

clickable_entry_points.managed_web: Install a branded shortcut, pinned browser app, start-menu entry, or Linux desktop entry that opens the approved Blacklight web URL.
clickable_entry_points.local_shell: Use the app icon to start the local service when needed and open /console in the packaged shell or controlled browser view.
clickable_entry_points.user_promise: Click Blacklight Studio, review readiness, run the workflow.

installer.admin_permission_message: Blacklight Studio can install and configure a local model runtime for private/offline use. This may require administrator permissions and can download model files to this computer.

first_run_modes.label: Local model
first_run_modes.summary: Use private/local inference with model readiness checks and optional model download.

first_run_modes.label: Hosted provider
first_run_modes.summary: Use an existing approved provider key and validate readiness before running workflows.

first_run_modes.label: Demo mode
first_run_modes.summary: Explore with synthetic examples and no live provider.
